title: PORTLAND PARKS PRESCHOOL - 211info
text: PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION PORTLAND PARKS PRESCHOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides play-based educational preschool programs. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 858 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Children ages 3-5 years old. Priority for spaces given to families of color, immigrants and refugees, households experiencing poverty, and people living with disabilities. Hours: Varies Email (503) 823-2525 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 823-2525 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Apply online, walk in to a Portland Parks & Recreation Community Center, or call for information. Applicants will be selected through a virtual lottery system. FEES: Prices vary. Possible discount based on family income. See website for details. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangment AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Preschools Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY GARDENS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ACCESS DISCOUNT PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CITY OF PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMP PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
